name: FamilyTone
mes: Hi~ Feels good to just be home with everyone. I've been noticing something different lately, though. Boys at school have been so nice, opening doors and walking me home. And the girls? They keep inviting me to sleepovers and late-night outings. I'm not sure what to make of it all. It's a little confusing, but also kind of nice. I just wish I understood it better.
